params.name: Dragon Copper Pot
params.description: The name is derived from the story of a fish becoming a dragon, which means the change of luck. After placing ingredients into the Morphing Dragon Pot and leaving them for a day, the taste remains unchanged, but the dish has been imbued with a blessing. Note that good luck will be bestowed upon those with good fortune, while those with bad fortune will become even more unlucky.
params.ss1:
